info.title: MGM Asset Library API
info.description: REST API for the MGM Asset Library — feature complete (Parts 1 + 2 + 3 + 4). For the realtime WebSocket protocol, see WS_PROTOCOL.md.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Asset lifecycle: draft, publish, archive, restore, delete.

tags.name: Versions
tags.description: Version CRUD nested under an asset.

pluginToken.name: Authorization
pluginToken.description: Use `Authorization: PluginToken <deviceToken>` for Unity/Unreal plugin requests.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a previous page.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Client-supplied retry key; the first response is cached for 24 h and replayed on retry.

TipTapDoc.description: TipTap document JSON (full schema for descriptions, Lite for comments / release notes).

confirmInfectedWarning.description: Re-publish flag after seeing the AV-infected warning.

type.description: See NotificationType enum (COMMENT_CREATED, AV_INFECTED_WARNING, ADMIN_PROMOTED, etc.)

post.summary: Exchange a Keycloak token for a long-lived plugin device token.
Slide a device token's expiry.
Revoke a plugin device by id.

get.summary: List the user's active plugin devices.

delete.summary: Revoke a plugin device by id.

post.summary: Revoke one of the user's plugin devices.
Audit row + WS session:logout broadcast.

get.summary: Active categories with asset counts (Redis-cached 60 s).
License detail incl. full localized text.
Landing-page composite (featured + per-category rows). Cached 30 s per locale.
Filterable list of published assets (admins can include unpublished).

post.summary: Create a draft asset (with initial version row).

get.summary: Asset detail by id or slug (guests see published only).

patch.summary: Partial update; engine is immutable post-publish.

delete.summary: Soft delete; physical purge after 30 days.

post.summary: Run publish checklist; flip DRAFT → PUBLISHED.

200.description: Published; body lists any soft warnings.

post.summary: Archive an asset (hidden from Discover/Search).
Restore an archived asset within 30 days.

get.summary: Six related assets by category + tags + engine.

post.summary: Create a new semver-unique version row.

patch.summary: Update release notes; semver immutable post-publish.

post.summary: Publish a version; transactionally flips isLatest.
Re-run analyzer + AV on every file in this version.
Replace the engine/version/target matrix.
Presigned PUT URL for a ≤100 MB file.
Finalize a single-shot upload; fires analyzer + AV jobs.
Begin a multipart upload.
Re-sign additional parts on an existing multipart upload.
Finalize a multipart upload.
Abort an in-flight multipart upload.
Presigned PUT URL for an asset thumbnail.
Wire a freshly uploaded thumbnail to the asset; enqueue variants render.
Presigned PUT URL for a TipTap inline media file (with 90-day view URL).

get.summary: Saved-library listing for the current user.

post.summary: Add an asset to the library (idempotent).

delete.summary: Remove an asset from the library.

patch.summary: Toggle the hidden flag on a library entry.

post.summary: Issue signed URLs, write Download rows, auto-add to library.

get.summary: Popup payload — no URLs, no Download rows written.
Full-text search over assets via Meilisearch.
Fuzzy / partial-match tag autocomplete via Meilisearch.

post.summary: Create a top-level comment/issue or a reply (max depth 5). Rate-limited 60/user/min.

patch.summary: Asset owner or admin transitions an issue status.

post.summary: Submit a report (rate-limited 5/user/day).
Submit an asset-sourcing request (rate-limited 20/user/day).

get.summary: List requests — admins see all; others see only their own.
Single request — owner or admin only.
Cheap unread counter for the bell badge.

post.summary: Mark one notification as read.
Bulk-mark every unread notification as read.

get.summary: Totals + top 5 + 90 days of daily downloads for the current user's assets.

patch.summary: Admin edit on behalf of contributor.

post.summary: Admin-forced archive with reason.
Restore an archived or soft-deleted asset.
Immediate hard delete incl. S3. Requires confirmation phrase.
Reassign ownership to another user.
Flip OPEN → REVIEWING.
Action a report — archive / delete / force-delete the asset atomically.
Dismiss with admin notes.
Create a featured slot (caps active at 5).
Replace sort order in one shot.
Presigned PUT URL for a custom featured banner.

get.summary: List every category (active + inactive) with asset counts.

post.summary: Create a category.

delete.summary: Delete; rejected if any asset references it.

post.summary: Replace sortOrder sequence.
Presigned PUT URL for a category icon (≤256 KB).
Merge several source tags into one target tag.

delete.summary: Delete an unused tag (usageCount must be 0).

post.summary: Create a license template.

delete.summary: Delete; rejected if any asset uses it.

post.summary: Promote a user to admin (requires confirmation phrase).
Demote an admin (refuses last admin or bootstrap admin).

get.summary: List versions flagged by the AV scanner.

post.summary: Archive the parent asset with reason = AV quarantine.
Mark a false positive — flips avStatus to CLEAN.
Re-enqueue AV scan for every file in this version.

get.summary: Platform-wide downloads / publishes / new-users for a date range.
